recommendations.title: Forget Me Not
recommendations.overview: It's graduation weekend, and Sandy Channing, the popular class president of her small-town high school, should be enjoying the time of her life. But when her friends start disappearing, Sandy discovers they have unwittingly awakened the vengeful spir

recommendations.title: Sleepaway Camp II: Unhappy Campers
recommendations.overview: Angela Baker escapes from a mental hospital and surfaces at a summer camp as a counselor who lectures her teenage charges on proper moral behavior. Those teens who break her strict rules -- from the camp chatterbox or a sex-obsessed girl to the boys

recommendations.title: The Final
recommendations.overview: A group of high school outcasts get revenge on the students that torment them.

recommendations.title: Sleepaway Camp III: Teenage Wasteland
recommendations.overview: Psychotic Angela is itching to do what she does best: slaughter dozens of teenage campers. As luck would have it, the previous site of her murders has been renamed and converted into an experimental summer camp meant to bring together privileged and

recommendations.title: Requiem
recommendations.overview: Michaela, an epileptic, enrolls in college to study education. She goes off her medication and soon begins hearing voices and seeing apparitions that tell her to avoid religious objects, although she is devoutly Roman Catholic. One priest scoffs at t

recommendations.title: Rumble Through the Dark
recommendations.overview: In the dark landscape of the Mississippi Delta, a former bare-knuckle fighter must win one last fight to pay off his debts to the local mob boss and save his childhood home—the stakes nothing less than life or death.

recommendations.title: Phantoms
recommendations.overview: In the peaceful Colorado town of Snowfield, something evil has wiped out the community. And now, it's up to a group of people to stop it, or at least get out of Snowfield alive.

recommendations.title: The Lovely Bones
recommendations.overview: After being brutally murdered, 14-year-old Susie Salmon watches from heaven over her grief-stricken family -- and her killer. As she observes their daily lives, she must balance her thirst for revenge with her desire for her family to heal.

recommendations.title: Leaving Las Vegas
recommendations.overview: Ben Sanderson, an alcoholic Hollywood screenwriter who lost everything because of his drinking, arrives in Las Vegas to drink himself to death. There, he meets and forms an uneasy friendship and non-interference pact with prostitute Sera.

recommendations.title: Good Kids
recommendations.overview: Four high school students look to redefine themselves after graduation.
